holdings.infoBox: SEIQ is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.38%, NVIDIA at 7.19%, Microsoft at 6.27%, Meta Platforms at 3.95%, and Cisco Systems at 3.66%.

overview.description: The SEI Enhanced U.S. Large Cap Quality Factor ETF (SEIQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively selects US large-cap stocks it perceives as high quality, based on various quality, profitability, and risk factors. SEIQ was launched on May 18, 2022 and is issued by SEI.
